name: Buffalo-Style Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (8 ounces) WISHBONE Sweet N' Spicy French Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix 1 teaspoon of hot pepper sauce.
2. Season the chicken wings with the mixture and coat them lightly in flour.
3. Heat oil to 375 degrees F (190°C) in a deep-fat fryer or large heavy skillet.
4. Cut off the tips of the chicken wings and save them for soup.
5. Halve the chicken wings at the joint.
6. Carefully drop the chicken into the hot oil, a few at a time, and fry until golden brown, turning occasionally, about 15 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
7. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add green onions and garlic, stirring occasionally, until tender for 3 minutes.
8. Stir in sweet n' spicy French dressing, thyme, oregano, cumin, and hot pepper sauce.
9. Remove from heat and toss the chicken wings to coat with the sauce.
10. Serve with chunky blue cheese dressing and celery sticks.
